name: MLASTG Coverage Map v0.1
description: MITRE ATLAS technique coverage by the MLSec Application Security Testing Guide (MLASTG). Green = Full coverage (MLASVS controls + MLASTG tests), Yellow = Partial (some controls mapped), Red = No coverage.
